excerpt: When a tornado disrupted their region, their cloud-based system allowed the business to stay up and running without missing a beat. And by capturing photos and videos before and after every rental, they’ve dramatically cut damage losses—savings that alone have covered the cost of Renterra many times over.
Record photos and videos of equipment in just 2 minutes... Automatically flag customer damage. Improve damage claim recovery by 65%. E-signed inspections eliminate customer damage disputes.

Reduce disputes and recover damage costs with a full visual record at check-in and check-out. Upload photos or videos of condition, meter readings, and diesel levels. Syncs automatically to the order timeline and can be easily sent to the customer to document proof.
Customers receive a text message prompting them to upload their license—no app, login, or staff intervention needed.
